tables: Central Board of Secondary Education CBSE Central Board Supplementary Admit Card 2026 | Class 10th Xth High School and Class 12th XIIth Intermediate Annual Board Exam 2026. The CBSE will declare the Secondary and Senior Secondary board Exam result April / May 2026. Candidates will be able to check their results/marks by entering their roll number on the official website. The official result date will be announced Soon. All registered students are advised to activate their DigiLocker accounts as soon as possible so that, once the results are released, they can receive their mark sheets and certificates in digital format via DigiLocker.
Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) CBSE Board Class Xth and Class XIIth Result 2026 CBSE Results 2026 | Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® Official WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Class 10th High School Exam Between : 17/02/2026 to 11/03/2026 Class 12th Intermediate Exam Between : 17/02/2026 to 10/04/2026 Digilocker Account Activate Through Security Pin : 14/04/2026 Class 10th Result Declared : 15/04/2026 Class 10th Second Board Exam Date : 15-21 May 2026 Class 12th Result Declared : 13 May 2026 Class 12th Re-Evaluation / Verification Result : 21/06/2026 Class 12th Supplementary Exam Date : 28/07/2026 Class 10th 2nd Board Examination Result : 18/07/2026 Class 12th Supplemtary Exam Date : 28/07/2026
Application Fee No Application Fee for the Checking CBSE Board Term II Class X & XII Exam Result & Activate Your DIGI Locker Account Through Security Pin.

Sarkari Result® :  How to Activate DIGILOCKER Account Through School Security Pin 2026 CBSE has issued a notice on 14 April 2026, in which it has been said that the annual board examination year 2026 of class 10 and 12 results / certificates and migration will be through Digilocker. All CBSE Board Class 10 and 12 students who have also appeared in the exam will have to create their own account in Digilocker. CBSE Board students can create their account in Digilocker by following some simple steps – which CBSE has also mentioned in its notice. Once the account is created in Digilocker, candidates can also download their CBSE Board 2026 result, marksheet, certificate and migration online after the issue. Step by Step to Activate CBSE Student to Activate Digilocker Account. Step 1 : The student will get the link to do DigiLocker Account Confirmation in the Some Useful Important Links section at the bottom of this page. Step 2 :T o confirm DigiLocker Account, the student has to first select his class such as X or XII. Step 3 : After that the student has to enter the code of his school. If the school code is not known, then they can see it in their admit card. Step 4 : After that the student has to enter his/her board exam roll number. Step 5 : After that Enter 6 Digit PIN provided by your school. Step 6 : After that the candidate has to enter his mobile number. Step 7 : An OTP will be received on the mobile number given by the student, he will have to enter it. Step 8 : DigiLocker Account Confirmation process will be completed. Now waiting for the candidate, whenever the CBSE Board will release the result of 2026 examination, candidates can also check their result through Digilocker as well as download the passing certificate / mark sheet and migration.

How to Check CBSE Board 10th & 12th Results 2026 CBSE Board Exam 2026 result can be released anytime in the month of April / May 2026. After the release of CBSE result of board exam, candidates can check their result through two means. After the release of CBSE result, candidates can check their class 10 and 12 result through CBSEResult and Digilocker whose direct link will be found in SarkariResult.Com Some Useful Important Link of this page. The student must have his/her roll number to view the CBSE Result 2026. All the registered students of CBSE Exam 2026 must activate their Digilocker account.
